title: Obliteration Scythe
description: Adds a giant scythe with an incredibly expensive recipe. This mod is supposed to resemble older Minecraft mods with the giant op weapons.
body:
Do you want an overpowered scythe that has such an expensive recipe no one in the entirety of the multiverse could ever craft it in the lifespan of the universe? Well I got the mod for you.





## The Obliteration Scythe

Attack Damage: 319,703,482,421,767,336,410,749,590,007,549,889,523,644,232,695 HP

Attack Speed: 1.6

Durability: 127,999

Repair item: Netherstar


### Effects

Speed IV

Strength 255

Resistance VI

Regeneration 255

Strikes lightning down on whatever you hit.
When The Scythe is crafted many lightning bolts strike down alerting your location to any players and warning people that you have The Scythe.
Right clicking with The Scythe will explode the area around you and launch you into the air.

![Obliteration Scythe Simple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c31ed167d36a687da812000eb082fbb76321cfcd.png)
